component.name: Camera Controls
component.summary: Webcam configuration for the COSMIC desktop

description.p: Native COSMIC desktop application for configuring webcams via the Linux V4L2 API. Provides live preview, dynamic control enumeration based on what each camera reports, resolution and framerate selection, and per-camera profile persistence.

ul.li: Live camera preview with MJPEG and YUYV decode
Dynamic control UI generated from hardware capabilities
Resolution and framerate selection with live preview update
Per-camera profile persistence keyed by USB VID:PID:serial
Auto-save on every change, auto-restore on launch
